title: Opening for Store Manager at IKEA India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at IKEA India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
IKEA India Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IKEA India Digital Technologies:
IKEA India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
